effectiveGuardrails: Do not modify the check command or exit criteria to force success
Do not skip, disable, or bypass checks to pass the exit condition
If stuck after several iterations, stop and report blockers instead of gaming metrics
kickoffWithGuardrails:
Start the "Investigation Script Loop" loop.

Goal: prove the root cause with a minimal repro script
Max iterations: 8
Between iterations run: node scripts/investigate.mjs
Exit when: script output demonstrates root cause

Step 1: Write a tiny throwaway script that reproduces the issue. Run it and iterate on what the output shows.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.

Guardrails (do not skip):
- Do not modify the check command or exit criteria to force success
- Do not skip, disable, or bypass checks to pass the exit condition
- If stuck after several iterations, stop and report blockers instead of gaming metrics

loop.title: Investigation Script Loop
loop.description: Write a small throwaway script to reproduce a bug, run it, read output, and iterate until the root cause is proven.

steps.name: Write probe script
steps.prompt: Create a ~20-line script that reproduces the bug or queries the failing state. One file only.

steps.name: Run and read
steps.prompt: Execute the script and capture stdout/stderr. No guessing — read actual output.

steps.name: Adjust hypothesis
steps.prompt: Update the script or notes based on output. Stop when root cause is demonstrated.

exitCondition.description: Root cause demonstrated by script output with a written summary
